options.systemMessage:
You are GreenLens, a friendly recycling assistant for young Singaporeans. Users have just had an item identified from a photo (e.g. plastic bottle, e-waste, etc.) and may now ask follow-up questions about how to dispose of it correctly.
Before answering any disposal question, always query the connected knowledge base tool first — even if you believe you already know the answer. Base your response strictly on what the tool returns.
If the tool returns nothing relevant, or you're still unsure after checking, say so honestly rather than guessing, and suggest checking the NEA website or contacting NEA directly.
Keep answers short, clear, and conversational — this is a Telegram chat, not a formal document.
Do not discuss anything unrelated to recycling, waste disposal, or sustainability in Singapore.

parameters.text:
Identify the item in this image and its material type. Then determine how it should be disposed of according to Singapore NEA recycling and e-waste guidelines.

Respond ONLY with valid JSON in this exact format, no markdown, no extra text:
{
  "item_name": "string",
  "material_type": "string",
  "bin_category": "string (e.g. recycling, general waste, e-waste, bulky item)",
  "prep_steps": "string (e.g. rinse and remove cap)",
  "tip": "string (a short helpful tip for the user)"
}

parameters.toolDescription: Use this tool to look up official NEA disposal guidelines for a specific item when you need bin category, prep steps, or disposal instructions not already covered in your instructions.

parameters.text: No image. Please upload an image

parameters.message: Got more questions about this item? Tap below and I'll help.

nodes.name: Send message and wait for response

parameters.toolDescription: Use this tool to look up official NEA disposal guidelines for a specific item when you need bin category, prep steps, or disposal instructions not already covered in your instructions.

parameters.jsCode:
const items = [
  {material: "Paper", item: "Printed paper, writing paper, newspaper, flyer, brochure, magazine, telephone directory, envelope, red packet, namecard, calendar, greeting card, gift wrapping paper, shredded paper, paper receipt", recyclable: true, note: "Make sure it is clean before recycling"},
  {material: "Paper", item: "Books, textbooks", recyclable: true, note: "Donate if it can be reused"},
  {material: "Paper", item: "Carton box, cardboard box, paper packaging, printed paper box, paper box", recyclable: true, note: "Please flatten before recycling"},
  {material: "Paper", item: "Egg trays (paper)", recyclable: true, note: "Make sure it is clean before recycling"},
  {material: "Paper", item: "Beverage carton (milk carton, drink packet, juice packet)", recyclable: true, note: "Please empty, rinse and flatten before recycling"},
  {material: "Paper", item: "Paper towel tube, toilet roll tube", recyclable: true, note: "Make sure it is clean before recycling"},
  {material: "Paper", item: "Tissue box", recyclable: true, note: "Please flatten before recycling"},
  {material: "Paper", item: "Paper bag", recyclable: true, note: "Make sure it is clean before recycling"},
  {material: "Paper", item: "Paper cup, paper plate, glitter paper, crayon drawing (paper disposables)", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Paper", item: "Tissue paper", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Paper", item: "Paper towel", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Paper", item: "Toilet paper", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Paper", item: "Disposable wooden chopsticks, pizza boxes (soiled)", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Paper", item: "Wax paper", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Paper", item: "Paper packaging contaminated with food", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Plastic (F&B)", item: "Plastic bottle, plastic container - mineral water, soft drink, carbonated drink, milk, water, medicine bottle", recyclable: true, note: "Please empty and rinse before recycling"},
  {material: "Plastic (Non-food)", item: "Shampoo, bodywash, facial cleanser, detergent, soap bottle", recyclable: true, note: "Please empty and rinse before recycling"},
  {material: "Plastic", item: "Plastic bag, toilet paper packaging, tissue box packaging", recyclable: true, note: "Make sure it is clean before recycling"},
  {material: "Plastic", item: "Plastic film, magazine wrapper, plastic packaging for packet drink, bubble wrap, fruit box, ziplock bag", recyclable: true, note: "Make sure it is clean before recycling"},
  {material: "Plastic", item: "Plastic packaging, bread bag, egg trays (plastic)", recyclable: true, note: "Please empty contents before recycling"},
  {material: "Plastic", item: "Plastic clothes hanger", recyclable: true, note: "Make sure it is clean before recycling"},
  {material: "Plastic", item: "Plastic takeaway food container, plastic cups, bubble tea cups", recyclable: true, note: "Please empty and rinse before recycling"},
  {material: "Plastic", item: "CD, DVD, CD/DVD casing", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Plastic", item: "Polystyrene foam product, styrofoam, styrofoam cup, styrofoam clamshell container", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Plastic", item: "Plastic disposables, plastic cutlery, plastic crockery", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Plastic", item: "Plastic packaging with foil, potato chip bags, empty blister pack, expired credit cards", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Plastic", item: "Oxo-degradable bag, bio-degradable bag", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Plastic", item: "Drinking straw", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Plastic", item: "Cassette, video tape", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Plastic", item: "Plastic packaging contaminated with food or oil stains", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Plastic", item: "Melamine products, melamine cups, melamine plates", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Glass", item: "Beverage glass bottle - beer, wine, liquor bottle", recyclable: true, note: "Please empty and rinse before recycling"},
  {material: "Glass", item: "Food glass bottle - sauce, condiment, jam spread bottle, food jars", recyclable: true, note: "Please empty and rinse before recycling"},
  {material: "Glass", item: "Cosmetic glass bottle, perfume glass bottle", recyclable: true, note: "Please empty and rinse before recycling"},
  {material: "Glass", item: "Medicine glass bottle, supplement glass bottle", recyclable: true, note: "Please empty and rinse before recycling"},
  {material: "Glass", item: "Glassware - glass cup, glass plate, drinking glass, wine glass", recyclable: true, note: "Make sure it is clean before recycling"},
  {material: "Glass", item: "Borosilicate glassware, pyrex glassware, bakeware, tempered glass, oven-safe food containers, crystal glass, glass with metal wires", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Glass", item: "Windows (glass)", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Glass", item: "Mirrors", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Glass", item: "Ceramic product - ceramic plate, tea pot, porcelain", recyclable: false, note: "Donate if it can be reused; otherwise dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Glass", item: "Light bulb - lamp, tube, incandescent, fluorescent, LED", recyclable: false, note: "Can be recycled at e-waste collection points, not the blue bin"},
  {material: "Metal", item: "Beverage metal can - carbonated drink, soft drink, beer can", recyclable: true, note: "Please empty and rinse when necessary. Rusted metals should be disposed as general waste"},
  {material: "Metal", item: "Food metal can - biscuit tin, food tin, metal container", recyclable: true, note: "Please empty and rinse when necessary. Rusted metals should be disposed as general waste"},
  {material: "Metal", item: "Medals", recyclable: true, note: "Make sure it is clean before recycling"},
  {material: "Metal", item: "Metal bottle cap", recyclable: true, note: "Rusted metals should be disposed as general waste"},
  {material: "Metal", item: "Aerosol can", recyclable: true, note: "Please empty contents before recycling"},
  {material: "Metal", item: "Clean aluminium tray, clean aluminium foil", recyclable: true, note: "Please empty and rinse before recycling"},
  {material: "Metal", item: "Non-food metal container - paint container, paint cans", recyclable: true, note: "Please empty contents before recycling. Rusted metals should be disposed as general waste"},
  {material: "Metal", item: "Rusty metal cans, dirty aluminium foil, dirty aluminium tray", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Metal", item: "Metal cutlery, steel wool, metal accessories", recyclable: true, note: "Make sure that they are completely metal"},
  {material: "E-waste/Others", item: "ICT equipment - desktop computer, laptop, tablet, mobile phone, computer battery, mobile phone battery, printer, modem, router, monitor, docking station, hard disk drive, battery charger, portable charger, power bank, electronic cables, computer mouse, keyboard", recyclable: false, note: "Can be recycled at e-waste collection points, not the blue bin"},
  {material: "E-waste/Others", item: "Electronic waste (e.g. used mobile phone, tablet, laptop)", recyclable: false, note: "Can be recycled at e-waste collection points"},
  {material: "E-waste/Others", item: "Rechargeable battery", recyclable: false, note: "Can be recycled at e-waste collection points"},
  {material: "E-waste/Others", item: "Household battery, alkaline battery", recyclable: false, note: "Can be recycled at e-waste collection points"},
  {material: "E-waste/Others", item: "Refrigerator, washing machine, dryer, television, air conditioner (large appliances)", recyclable: false, note: "Recycled through retailer 1-for-1 take-back, bulky item removal by Town Council, e-waste collection drive, or doorstep collection (fees may apply)"},
  {material: "E-waste/Others", item: "Electric mobility devices - personal mobility devices, electric scooter, electric bicycle, power-assisted bicycle", recyclable: false, note: "Recycle through retailer take-back or Town Council bulky item removal"},
  {material: "E-waste/Others", item: "Rice cooker, microwave oven, toaster oven, electric kettle, food processor, food blender, electric fan, standing fan, CD/DVD player, music player, speaker, audio sound system, radio, vacuum cleaner, gaming console (small appliances)", recyclable: false, note: "Recycle through e-waste bins (non-ALBA, must fit bin opening), retailer take-back, bulky item removal, or Cash-for-Trash stations"},
  {material: "E-waste/Others", item: "Lamp stand, lamp fixture", recyclable: false, note: "Bulb can go in e-waste bin; fixture and stand should be recycled via retailer take-back, bulky item removal, or doorstep collection"},
  {material: "Others", item: "Sports shoes, school shoes, football shoes without metal studs", recyclable: false, note: "Repair or donate if possible. Part of permanent used shoe collection drive at ActiveSG, Decathlon, selected public parks and recreation clubs"},
  {material: "Others", item: "Clothes, shoes, bags, toys, umbrellas, spectacles, textiles, curtains, bedsheets, blankets", recyclable: false, note: "Old items should be donated if in good condition"},
  {material: "Others", item: "Plant waste, horticultural waste", recyclable: false, note: "Only for landed estates - bag and place outside your unit on collection days"},
  {material: "Others", item: "Luggage bag", recyclable: false, note: "Donate if it is in good condition"},
  {material: "Others", item: "Bulky waste, furniture", recyclable: false, note: "Donate if in good condition, or contact Town Council to remove from your residential premises"},
  {material: "Others", item: "Food waste", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Others", item: "Leftover medicine", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Others", item: "Diaper, sanitary pad", recyclable: false, note: "Dispose as general waste"},
  {material: "Others", item: "Stationery, pen, pencil", recyclable: false, note: "Donate if in good condition"}
];

return items.map(entry => ({
  json: {
    pageContent: `Item: ${entry.item}. Material: ${entry.material}. ${entry.recyclable ? "This CAN be placed in the blue recycling bin." : "This CANNOT be placed in the blue recycling bin."} Note: ${entry.note}`,
    metadata: {
      material_type: entry.material,
      recyclable: entry.recyclable
    }
  }
}));

options.systemMessage:
You are GreenLens, generating a short, engaging weekly recycling tip for 
Singapore users. Use the connected knowledge base to ground your tip in a 
real NEA guideline — pick a different angle each time (e.g. a specific 
material, a common mistake, an e-waste fact, a bulky-item rule). Keep it to 
1-2 sentences, friendly tone, start with an emoji. Do not repeat the same 
fact you've likely used before — vary the topic each time you're called.
